title: Teltonika TSW210 Unmanaged Industrial Switch
description: The Teltonika TSW210 switch is an industrial unmanaged switch for centralizing your resources. It is equipped with 2 SFP ports for communication via optical fibers over long distances. Its integral part is also 8 Gigabit Ethernet ports with a download/upload of up to 1000 Mb/s Durable, robust aluminum housing with DIN rail and surface mounting options make the TSW210 the perfect solution for industrial environments. There is a classic 2-pin industrial DC power socket with an input voltage range of 7-57 VDC A powerful unmanaged switch Compact size Durable design - aluminum cover Can be placed on a DIN rail Interface: 2x SFP, 8x gigabit ethernet, 2-pin DC power socket Device QSG (Quick Start Guide)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1000Mbps Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 3,7 Power via connector/terminal 7 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Metal Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Width [mm] 132 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 95 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 20 MAC address table 2000 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9216
